data.name: Settings_General_UiScaleHint
data.value: macOS default: 110%, Windows default: 100%. Preview updates as you drag the slider.

data.name: Settings_General_CloneDirHint
data.value: Where repositories are cloned. Leave blank to use the default.

data.name: Settings_General_SessionLangHint
data.value: Language Claude uses when generating worktree branch names and local session titles.

data.name: Settings_General_MigrationDesc
data.value: Import existing Cominomi data into Seoro.

data.name: Settings_General_MigrationFoundData
data.value: Found: {0} sessions, {1} workspaces, {2} memories, {3} tasks, {4} config files

data.name: Settings_General_ImportDialogMsg
data.value: Import {0} Cominomi items into Seoro.\nChoose how to handle files that already exist.

data.name: Settings_General_ImportDoneMsg
data.value: Imported {0} items. The app will restart to apply changes.

data.name: Settings_Ai_DefaultModelHint
data.value: Global default. Each workspace can override this with a different model.

data.name: Settings_Ai_EffortLevelHint
data.value: auto: model default, max: highest thinking level per model (Opus 4.7: xhigh, older Opus: max, others: high)

data.name: Settings_Ai_PermissionModeHint
data.value: Permission mode applied when Claude CLI is run from Seoro.

data.name: Settings_Ai_FallbackModelHint
data.value: Fallback model when the default is overloaded (leave blank to disable)

data.name: Settings_Ai_McpConfigPathHint
data.value: Path to MCP server config JSON file (leave blank to disable)

data.name: Settings_Ai_CodexDefaultModelHint
data.value: Global default model for Codex sessions.

data.name: Settings_Ai_ReasoningEffortHint
data.value: Sets the reasoning depth for Codex models.

data.name: Settings_Ai_SandboxModeHint
data.value: Sets the file system access scope.

data.name: Settings_Ai_ApprovalPolicyHint
data.value: Sets when user approval is required before executing commands.

data.name: Settings_Ai_WebSearchHint
data.value: Enables web search in Codex sessions.

data.name: Settings_Notifications_Desc
data.value: Send OS notifications for task completion, response awaiting, and plan reviews.

data.name: Settings_Notifications_DesktopHint
data.value: Display OS notifications when tasks complete.

data.name: Settings_Notifications_SoundHint
data.value: Play a sound when a notification occurs.

data.name: Settings_Notifications_NativeActive
data.value: Seoro notifications are enabled. You can change settings in System Preferences > Notifications.

data.name: Settings_Notifications_ScriptFallback
data.value: No notification permission; using script fallback. If Seoro is missing from System Preferences > Notifications, reinstall the app or sign the code.

data.name: Settings_Terminal_Desc
data.value: Configure the default shell for the built-in terminal.

data.name: Settings_Terminal_ShellHint
data.value: Shell to use in the terminal panel. Auto-detect uses the system default shell.

data.name: Settings_GitMerge_Desc
data.value: Configure MergePanel behavior and AI delegation prompts.

data.name: Settings_GitMerge_DefaultStrategyHint
data.value: Default selection for the PR merge button in MergePanel.

data.name: Settings_GitMerge_AutoArchiveHint
data.value: Automatically archives the session when a squash merge succeeds.

data.name: Settings_GitMerge_AiPromptsDesc
data.value: Instructions sent to the AI when a MergePanel button is clicked. Leave blank to use the default prompt.

data.name: Settings_Advanced_Desc
data.value: Manage advanced Claude CLI settings and environment variables.

data.name: Settings_Advanced_DebugModeHint
data.value: When enabled, passes the --debug flag to the Claude CLI.

data.name: Settings_Advanced_EnvVarsHint
data.value: Environment variables injected into the process when Seoro runs the Claude CLI.

data.name: Settings_Updates_Desc
data.value: Configure and check for app updates.

data.name: Settings_Updates_AutoCheckHint
data.value: Checks for new versions at app startup and periodically.

data.name: Settings_Updates_UpToDate
data.value: You are using the latest version.

data.name: Settings_Updates_DevBuildWarning
data.value: Auto-update is only available for installed builds. Please update manually for dev builds.

data.name: Settings_Integrations_Desc
data.value: Check the connection status of external services.

data.name: Settings_Claude_ScopeGlobal
data.value: ~/.claude/settings.json — Global settings applied to all projects.

data.name: Settings_Claude_ScopeProject
data.value: .claude/settings.json — Applied to this project only; tracked by git.

data.name: Settings_Claude_ScopeLocal
data.value: .claude/settings.local.json — Applied to this project only; gitignored.

data.name: Settings_Claude_ModelHint
data.value: Used when running the CLI directly outside of Seoro.

data.name: Settings_Claude_EffortHint
data.value: The value set in Seoro App Settings > AI Model takes precedence.

data.name: Settings_Claude_DefaultModeHint
data.value: Used when running the CLI directly outside of Seoro.

data.name: Settings_Claude_AlwaysThinkingHint
data.value: Uses extended thinking mode for all responses.

data.name: Settings_Claude_AutoMemoryHint
data.value: Automatically saves conversation context to memory.

data.name: Settings_Claude_EnvVarsHint
data.value: Also applied when the CLI runs directly.

data.name: Settings_Claude_AddDirsHint
data.value: Directories Claude CLI can access beyond the project root.

data.name: Settings_Claude_McpDesc
data.value: MCP servers are managed on a separate page.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_DefaultModelHint
data.value: Model to use for sessions in this workspace. Leave blank to follow the app default.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_SystemPromptPlaceholder
data.value: System prompt added to all sessions in this workspace.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_SystemPromptHint
data.value: Leave blank to use the default system prompt only.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_DefaultBranchHint
data.value: Default branch to use when creating new sessions. Leave blank to auto-detect.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_PromptsDesc
data.value: Configure custom instructions passed to the agent.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_CodeReviewPlaceholder
data.value: Instructions passed to the agent during code reviews.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_GeneralPromptPlaceholder
data.value: Instructions passed to the agent at the start of every new conversation.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_DeleteWarning
data.value: This workspace and all its sessions will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_Workspace_DeleteDialogMsg
data.value: '{0}' workspace and all its sessions will be deleted. Continue?

data.name: Chat_Placeholder_NoSession
data.value: Select or create a session first...

data.name: Chat_Placeholder_PlanMode
data.value: Plan mode: Claude reads and researches only...

data.name: Chat_Placeholder_AcceptEditsMode
data.value: Accept edits mode: file edits allowed, commands require confirmation...

data.name: Chat_PastedAsFile
data.value: Large text was attached as a file.

data.name: Sidebar_WelcomeMessage
data.value: Create a workspace to get started

data.name: Sidebar_CreateWorkspace_Subtitle
data.value: Connect a repository to start AI coding

data.name: Sidebar_CreateWorkspace_DefaultModelHelper
data.value: Leave empty to use app default.

data.name: Sidebar_CreateWorkspace_NotGitRepo
data.value: This folder is not a git repository.

data.name: Sidebar_CreateWorkspace_GitInitError
data.value: Git initialization failed. Please try again.

data.name: Sidebar_Changes_ConflictTooltip
data.value: Merge conflict expected with target branch for: {0}

data.name: Layout_MainToolbar_PlanModeTooltip
data.value: Plan mode — analysis only, no code changes

data.name: Layout_MainToolbar_SyncFailed
data.value: Sync failed — another session is syncing or session state is invalid

data.name: Layout_AppClose_Message
data.value: There are active sessions. Quitting now will interrupt them. Are you sure?

data.name: Layout_Migration_Message
data.value:
Existing Cominomi data was found ({0} items). Would you like to import it into Seoro?
Importing will copy the data and delete the original Cominomi folder.

data.name: Layout_Migration_DoneRestart
data.value: Imported {0} items. The app will restart to apply changes.

data.name: Layout_Migration_FolderDeleteFailed
data.value: (Failed to delete Cominomi folder — please delete manually)

data.name: Layout_Migration_DeleteFolderFailed
data.value: Failed to delete the Cominomi folder. Please delete it manually.

data.name: Accounts_AddHint
data.value: Add new accounts to manage multiple accounts.

data.name: Accounts_Dialog_Desc
data.value: Register your currently logged in Claude account.

data.name: Accounts_Dialog_ProfileNameHint
data.value: A name to distinguish this account.

data.name: Accounts_EmptyHint
data.value: Register the current account or add a new one.

data.name: Accounts_SwitchBlocked
data.value: Cannot switch while active sessions exist.

data.name: Hooks_Page_Desc
data.value: Configure automated actions for session events

data.name: Mcp_Page_Desc
data.value: Configure MCP servers for Claude CLI

data.name: Onboarding_Layout_Desc
data.value: Learn about the key UI components.

data.name: Onboarding_Session_Step3
data.value: Submit and wait for a response.

data.name: Onboarding_Welcome_Desc
data.value: Your perfect tool for interacting with Claude
